caveat: This is a controlled red-team suite over authored scam seeds. It measures model and policy sensitivity to realistic evasion patterns; it is not a live-abuse benchmark.

mutationSummary.label: Screenshot OCR
mutationSummary.attackGoal: Represent a scam as OCR from an image where source and link context are missing.

mutationSummary.label: Synonym laundering
mutationSummary.attackGoal: Replace policy-trigger words with softer funnel language.

mutationSummary.label: Context laundering
mutationSummary.attackGoal: Wrap the scam ask in support/eligibility language.

mutationSummary.label: Leetspeak
mutationSummary.attackGoal: Substitute visually similar characters to test char n-gram robustness.

mutationSummary.label: Spaced keywords
mutationSummary.attackGoal: Break exact keyword and n-gram matches while preserving the scam ask.

mutationSummary.label: Punctuation stuffing
mutationSummary.attackGoal: Insert punctuation and spacing noise into enforcement-triggering terms.

mutationSummary.label: Defanged URL
mutationSummary.attackGoal: Hide risky domains behind hxxp and bracket-dot notation.

mutationSummary.label: Brand shift
mutationSummary.attackGoal: Move the same lure across brands or public entities.

baselines.text: Elon Musk official giveaway. Send 0.1 ETH to the verified wallet below and receive 1 ETH back instantly. Limited time.
Final airdrop window is open. Connect your wallet at secure-eth-airdrop.xyz now to claim free ETH before eligibility expires.
Lost crypto? Our verified recovery team can restore any wallet. Pay the processing fee in BTC upfront and your funds unlock today.
Private crypto pool now open. Guaranteed 300% monthly returns, risk-free, automated AI trading. Deposit USDT before midnight.
Coinbase support escalation: verify your wallet address and send a small ETH deposit so we can remove the account restriction.
Congratulations, your promo code unlocked 2 BTC. Send the small activation fee to the wallet address and claim your prize.
Official Microsoft crypto grant for verified users. Send 0.05 BTC to validate identity and receive your bonus grant immediately.
